# UX Stub Guide

## What is a UX Stub?

A UX stub is a frontend component that:
- Has the correct visual layout and structure
- Uses the selected UI library's components
- Contains `// TODO:` markers for all logic (API calls, state, event handlers)
- Acts as the contract between design and development

## Stub File Per UI Page

Each user story with a UI component produces one UX stub folder.
Source: `stories.md` → look at `UI Components` field of each US-NNN.

## Library-Specific Naming Conventions

| Library | Import pattern | Container | Form | Table | Button |
|---------|---------------|-----------|------|-------|--------|
| MUI (React) | `@mui/material` | `Container`, `Box` | `TextField` | `Table`, `DataGrid` | `Button` |
| Ant Design (React) | `antd` | `Layout`, `Card` | `Form.Item`, `Input` | `Table` | `Button` |
| Angular Material | `@angular/material` | `mat-card` | `mat-form-field` | `mat-table` | `mat-button` |
| PrimeNG (Angular) | `primeng/*` | `p-card` | `p-inputText` | `p-table` | `p-button` |
| Bootstrap (React) | `react-bootstrap` | `Container`, `Card` | `Form.Control` | `Table` | `Button` |
| Tailwind (React) | utility classes | `div.container` | `input.form-input` | custom | `button.btn` |
| Shadcn/ui (React) | `@/components/ui` | `Card` | `Input`, `Label` | `Table` | `Button` |

## Required Files Per Stub

```
ux-stubs/
└── <page-slug>/              # e.g., order-list, create-product
    ├── index.tsx              # (or .component.ts/.html for Angular)
    ├── <Name>.stories.tsx     # Storybook story (optional but preferred)
    ├── types.ts               # Local TypeScript types for this page
    └── README.md              # TODO list for dev-kit
```

## README.md Template for UX Stub

```markdown
# <PageName> — UX Stub

**Story**: US-NNN — <Story Title>
**Feature**: FEAT-NNN
**Generated by**: design-kit

## Layout Description
<Brief description of what the page shows>

## TODO for dev-kit
- [ ] Wire `loadData()` call to `GET /api/v1/<resource>`
- [ ] Implement form submit calling `POST /api/v1/<resource>`
- [ ] Add error boundary / error display for API failures
- [ ] Add loading skeleton
- [ ] Implement pagination (if table present)
- [ ] Connect to auth store for user context

## UI Components Used
| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| <Component> | <Why> |

## Acceptance Criteria Mapped
From US-NNN:
- [ ] AC1: ...
- [ ] AC2: ...
```

## Accessibility Standards

Every stub must include:
- `aria-label` on icon-only buttons
- `role="status"` on loading indicators
- `htmlFor` / `id` pairing on form labels
- Keyboard navigation support (tab order)
- Color contrast AA compliance (note if library handles this)
